query: SELECT s.id, s.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products p WHERE p.store_id = s.id AND p.is_active = 1) as active, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products p WHERE p.store_id = s.id AND p.is_active = 0) as inactive, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products p WHERE p.store_id = s.id) as total FROM stores s WHERE s.name LIKE '%pple%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT s.id, s.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products p WHERE p.store_id = s.id AND p.is_active = 1) as active, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products p WHERE p.store_id = s.id AND p.is_active = 0) as inactive, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products p WHERE p.store_id = s.id) as total FROM stores s WHERE s.name LIKE '%pple%';
